name: [BUG-SF-003] TC-SF-009 — tokenInjectionEnabled must be true (currently false — root cause of trigger failure)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-003]**

**What this test does:**
Reads the tokenInjectionEnabled field from the status response and asserts it is true.

**Expected:** tokenInjectionEnabled = true
**Actual:** tokenInjectionEnabled = false

**What tokenInjectionEnabled=false means:**
The spr-fetcher is configured to call the KCB API WITHOUT first obtaining an OAuth token from the oauth-token-service. This means every KCB API call is unauthenticated.

**Why this is the root cause of BUG-SF-002:**
The KCB API at uat.buni.kcbgroup.com requires a valid Bearer token. Without one, the request is either rejected immediately or left hanging, causing the 504/connection error seen in TC-SF-007.

**Fix:**
Set tokenInjectionEnabled=true in spr-fetcher's application.yml and configure the oauth-token-service URL so the spr-fetcher can retrieve a KCB token before each fetch.

Expected: tokenInjectionEnabled = true
Actual: tokenInjectionEnabled = false

What tokenInjectionEnabled=false means:

Why this is the root cause of BUG-SF-002:
The KCB API at uat.buni.kcbgroup.com requires a valid Bearer token. Without one, the request is either rejected immediately or left hanging, causing the 504/connection error seen in TC-SF-007.

Fix:
Set tokenInjectionEnabled=true in spr-fetcher's application.yml and configure the oauth-token-service URL so the spr-fetcher can retrieve a KCB token before each fetch.

testStage.description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-003]**

**What this test does:**
Reads the tokenInjectionEnabled field from the status response and asserts it is true.

**Expected:** tokenInjectionEnabled = true
**Actual:** tokenInjectionEnabled = false

**What tokenInjectionEnabled=false means:**
The spr-fetcher is configured to call the KCB API WITHOUT first obtaining an OAuth token from the oauth-token-service. This means every KCB API call is unauthenticated.

**Why this is the root cause of BUG-SF-002:**
The KCB API at uat.buni.kcbgroup.com requires a valid Bearer token. Without one, the request is either rejected immediately or left hanging, causing the 504/connection error seen in TC-SF-007.

**Fix:**
Set tokenInjectionEnabled=true in spr-fetcher's application.yml and configure the oauth-token-service URL so the spr-fetcher can retrieve a KCB token before each fetch.
